hero_title: Build a Complete Entity Risk View
hero_title_accent: Consolidate Fragmented KYB and Wallet Data
hero_subtitle: SFTY helps VASP operations teams connect and unify multiple provider outputs into one audit-ready compliance workflow for comprehensive counterparty risk review and onboarding.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow
trust_card_4_value: Message routing, completeness checks and exception handling
trust_card_5_value: Regulatory changes mapped to internal rule
trust_card_6_value: Decision logs and evidence for every review
problem_title: Risk insights remain locked in silos
problem_description: Compliance teams struggle to consolidate counterparty and entity risk data across multiple disconnected providers. This fragmentation slows down risk reviews, weakens audit trails, and complicates the creation of a comprehensive entity 360 risk view.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY consolidates KYB, wallet risk, transaction data and provider outputs into unified case workflows, enabling compliance teams to build audit-ready 360-degree entity risk views with clear operational context.
workflow_title: From fragmented provider outputs to decisions
workflow_description: SFTY consolidates disparate provider checks, risk profiles and alerts into structured cases, enabling clear compliance decisions and audit-ready evidence for operational teams.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_title: Beyond fragmented inputs. One entity view
why_sfty_description: SFTY consolidates multiple provider outputs into a unified workflow, enabling VASPs to review entity risk with connected cases, decisions, evidence and audit-ready profiles.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY supports VASPs in consolidating fragmented provider data into audit-ready evidence for thorough counterparty review and scalable enterprise compliance deployment.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance

ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for VASP compliance teams?
faq_1_answer: SFTY provides VASP compliance teams a connected layer connecting KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening outputs into structured workflows, cases, evidence and reporting.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY connect fragmented risk profiles?
faq_2_answer: SFTY consolidates provider outputs into an entity 360 risk view by linking fragmented identity, wallet, transaction, counterparty and regulatory data in one operational workflow.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve audit-ready evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves case history, decision logs and provider evidence to support clear, audit-ready documentation for compliance reviews and regulatory inspections.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY connect with existing compliance tools?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY integrates with existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule providers without replacement, orchestrating their outputs into consistent compliance workflows and case management.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace KYC, KYB or Travel Rule providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY sits above KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule providers, turning their outputs into structured workflows without replacing underlying provider services.
final_title: Turn fragmented risk data into connected workflows
final_description: Review how SFTY connects KYB, wallet risk and Travel Rule outputs into one audit-ready, case-based entity risk view.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.

footer_legal_notice: This page is for informational purposes only and does not constitute legal, regulatory or compliance advice. SFTY deployment depends on jurisdiction, client requirements and applicable laws.
